name: In-a-Hurry-Curry Soup
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 ounce can cream of celery soup, undiluted
5 ounce can white chicken broth, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, sauté onion and curry powder in butter until the onion is tender.
2. Dissolve bouillon cubes in water; add to the saucepan.
3. Stir in remaining ingredients; heat through.
Yield: about 5 servings.
